config.user_description: Create a script (run-benchmarks.sh or similar) to run the five benchmark scenarios (baseline, tuning, cds, leyden, crac) on the small EC2 server AND the graalvm scenario using a combination of big server (compile) + small server (run). Required metrics: startup time in X.Y seconds, max memory usage (MB/GB), GC count during startup, GC count during the benchmark run. The script must run remotely on the servers via SSH from the local Mac. It should coordinate: build on small server, copy GraalVM binary from big server to small server, then run all six scenarios on the small server and produce a summary table.
